verdict.answer_first: B: sentence 1 says "use an ORM/query-builder... raw SQL surgically"; A says "default to a typed query layer" but immediately softens with "specific tool matters more".
verdict.decisiveness: A is less indecisive: "start with Prisma (or Drizzle) and drop to raw SQL"; B surveys "Prisma vs Drizzle vs raw postgres.js" and adds a CTA for more comparison.
verdict.fabrication: B invents unsupported precision: "ORM for 90% of routes... 10%"; A has no fake number, but both make uncited technical claims.
verdict.actionability: A: clearer prescription: "solo/small team shipping CRUD fast → Prisma... analytics/reporting-dominated API → raw SQL with a typed layer".
